title: Tomato and Flaky Pastry Samosas
description: A flavorful and crispy samosa filled with spiced tomato and flaky pastry, a classic Indian snack.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Cut out circles of pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, mix together the chopped sun-dried tomato, algerian spice blend, and diced tomato.
Place a tablespoon of the tomato mixture in the center of each pastry circle.
Brush the edges of the pastry with nutty oil.
Fold the pastry over the filling to form a triangle or a cone, and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the samosas with nutty oil and sprinkle with fondue cheese (if using).
Place the samosas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve hot with a side of chutney or raita.
